name: Equilibrium | Leader user ⚖️
description:
Leader user & society.

##News

In the wake of a protracted downturn under the previous administration, the nation has finally seated a new parliament.

Despite minimal airtime in mainstream outlets, organized labor voices optimism that living standards can now be raised.

Independent polling shows a persistent public concern that oligarchic interests still control key levers of power.

##What’s happening?

You now stand at the center of the government’s bureaucratic vortex. Live news feeds, the national ledger, strategic plans and the policy compass are all before you. Approve one of four parliamentary bills or put forward your own piece of legislation. Coffee, Madam / Mr. President?

##How does it work?

It's quite simple, Faction metrics (Influence, Welfare, Loyalty) range from 1 to 10. The budget runs from –10 to +10 — Let it drop below 0 the IMF will say "Hello there!".

High influence → that faction’s lobby will flood parliament with friendly bills.

Low Welfare → expect angry tweets, walk-outs and protest marches.

Low loyalty → brace for sabotage, lawsuits or outright rebellion.

So, my favorite reader, enjoy our book “Social Studies for Dummies” 📘

---

//Btw, if you’re a DeepSeek user, check my advanced prompts to improve your RP >[click]<

Enjoy, my favorite reader.
creator: captain S
